content:
# Best AI Video Tools for Real Estate Agents in 2026

Video is essential for real estate marketing, but production can be expensive. AI tools help you create professional property videos faster and cheaper!

Explore our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: Professional Listing Videos

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] helps real estate agents create polished listing videos with minimal effort.

### VEED for Real Estate
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for property video accessibility
- **Background removal**: Clean up footage instantly
- **Audio enhancement**: Remove background noise from property tours

**Try VEED Free**: https://veed.io

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Automated Property Highlights

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] can automatically generate property highlight videos from longer footage.

### Pictory for Real Estate
- **Auto-highlights**: Find the best moments in property tours
- **Text-to-video**: Create listings from property descriptions
- **AI voiceovers**: Add professional narration automatically

**Try Pictory**: https://pictory.ai

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Free Trial |
|------|----------|-------|------------|
| [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] | Quick editing | $12/mo | Yes |
| [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] | Automated highlights | $19/mo | Yes |
| [[link:/tools/9|Runway]] | Advanced effects | $12/mo | Yes |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Getting started**: Try [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]
- **Automated workflows**: Use [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]
- **Premium quality**: Go with [[link:/tools/9|Runway]]

Ready to create stunning property videos? Try these AI tools today!
